no: Amber Not the greatest writing. No reason to install the multiplayer component if you'll play solo

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks #3183 (Romance Cheats) creates dialogue stutter for Amber's romance. Only affects this specific component — skip Romance Cheats if using Amber.
conflicts.source: Component-level conflict only. All other cdtweaks components are compatible with Amber, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Install Amber before Rjali. Rjali comp #3 detects Amber via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and patches for multi-romance integration using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH.
conflicts.source: Rjali v12.5 multi.tpa checks MOD_IS_INSTALLED amber, patches M#Amber.bcs/dlg for multi-romance, 2026-03

sum: Adds Amber, a tiefling fighter/thief, as a joinable BG2 NPC with romance, personal quests, and extensive banters.
au: Meira Erviälä & Ville Marttila AKA Darios
